title: Registry Publication, SBOM, Provenance, Vulnerabilities, Policies, and CI Release · Docker Retrieval
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs registry publication, sbom, provenance, vulnerabilities, policies, and ci release from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the signed and policy-gated image release packet under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for signed and policy-gated image release packet after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Publish least-privilege authenticated content, verify digest after push, handle immutable tags, retention, mirrors, rate limits, and failure without credential leakage.
Generate, attach, inspect, export, validate, and interpret SPDX SBOM attestations including build-stage and final-image coverage.
Produce minimal or maximal SLSA provenance, locate materials and parameters, protect secret values, and verify the statement against source and builder policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:
